# Imiglucerase 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Imiglucerase 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Imiglucerase</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Imiglucerase 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Cerezyme (imiglucerase) is indicated for use as longterm enzyme replacement therapy in patients with a confirmed diagnosis of non-neuronopathic (Type 1) or chronic neuronopathic (Type 3) Gaucher...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>Hurler syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>Gaucher disease（99.4%）</li>
<li>Scheie syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of adrenal gland（99.3%）</li>
<li>autosomal ichthyosis syndrome with fatal disease course（99.2%）</li>
<li>cholesteryl ester storage disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>lysosomal storage disease with skeletal involvement（98.9%）</li>
<li>Wolman disease with hypolipoproteinemia and acanthocytosis（98.9%）</li>
<li>Wolman disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>proximal myopathy with extrapyramidal signs（98.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/imiglucerase/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
